ownership.name: Cal McNair (chairman/CEO)
ownership.style: Generally supportive of football operations; invested in winning; family ownership (Janice McNair holds title of owner)
ownership.tendencies: Backed DeMeco Ryans and Nick Caserio; patient with rebuild that turned to contention quickly

gm.name: Nick Caserio
gm.philosophy: Aggressive trader (7 trades in recent draft); values flexibility and draft capital accumulation; Belichick tree
gm.analytics_approach: New England analytical roots; data-driven with traditional scouting

head_coach.name: DeMeco Ryans
head_coach.scheme_offense: Spread concepts; building around C.J. Stroud; multiple TE sets
head_coach.scheme_defense: Aggressive 4-3; man-coverage heavy; exotic pressures; former 49ers DC — physical defensive identity

decision_makers.primary: Nick Caserio (EVP/GM) with DeMeco Ryans (HC) input

roster_2026.qb_situation: C.J. Stroud — elite young franchise QB; built to win now around him
key_departures: unverified — 12-win season indicates roster mostly intact
expiring_contracts: Ed Ingram (RG, due for new contract)

needs.reason: Most glaring need is interior offensive line; need upgrade over Jake Andrews at center or find new guard; Olaivavega Ioane (Penn State) frequently mocked
Interior defensive line needs reinforcement alongside offense; DeMeco Ryans wants dominant interior presence
Linebacker depth needs attention; Ryans' defense requires versatile, athletic linebackers
